allow: Bash(git commit -q -m 'Rename OrderProcessing to ArtificeWorks across solution *)
Bash(git -c core.safecrlf=false commit -q -m 'Rewrite project plan for the ArtificeWorks manufacturing system *)

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='\\''ArtificeWorks.Api.exe'\\'' OR Name='\\''dotnet.exe'\\''" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '\\''*ArtificeWorks.Api*'\\'' } | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \("killing " + $_.ProcessId\); Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force }')

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '\\''*ArtificeWorks.Api*'\\'' -and \($_.Name -eq '\\''ArtificeWorks.Api.exe'\\'' -or $_.CommandLine -like '\\''*run*'\\''\) } | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \('\\''killing '\\'' + $_.ProcessId + '\\'' '\\'' + $_.Name\); Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }')

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq '\\''ArtificeWorks.Api.exe'\\'' } | Select-Object ProcessId | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \('\\''alive: '\\'' + $_.ProcessId\) }; Write-Output '\\''checked'\\''')
